message:
test(ui): Add comprehensive unit tests for icon system

Add extensive test coverage for the terminal icon display infrastructure:

- Test Unicode icons contain non-ASCII characters in Interactive mode
- Test arrow icons (right/left/up/down) are distinct in Plain and Unicode modes
- Test tree drawing icons (branch/end/vertical/horizontal) are distinct
- Test slot icons (filled/empty/partial) are distinct
- Additional coverage tests for icon consistency

These tests ensure the icon system renders correctly across all output
contexts and that semantically different icons remain visually distinguishable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
